pukka.title: Pukka Flowchart
pukka.view: Unsure how to run Pukka? Use the {link}Pukka flowchart{/link} to step through its ability at night.

content.intro: The Pukka is one of the more difficult demons to run in Blood on the Clocktower, due to the way in which its ability interacts with others. A Pukka on its own is straightforward, but since its kills are offset from its choices it's harder to know what actions to take if a Pukka is drunk, poisoned, or chosen by an Exorcist. All of these interactions can happen on the Pukka's home script of {link}Bad Moon Rising{/link}.
content.intro2: To help storytellers run Pukka games without making mistakes, the Blood on the Clocktower community has produced a flowchart that shows the decisions that need to be made when running the Pukka during the night.
content.imagePreference: If you'd prefer a static image so that you can see the whole process, there is one below.
content.noJs: This interactive version of the flowchart still works without JavaScript enabled.
content.source: The following Pukka flowchart image was originally {externalLink}posted to Reddit by /u/Not_Quite_Vertical{/externalLink}.

decision.isExorcistPicked: Did the Exorcist pick the Pukka earlier tonight?
decision.isDrunkPoisonedOrGoon: Is the Pukka currently drunk or poisoned (including if they were the first player to choose the Goon on this night)?
decision.hasPreviousPick: Was anyone marked with the Pukka's poisoned reminder token before the Pukka's turn tonight?
decision.isDrunkPoisoned: Is the Pukka currently drunk or poisoned?
decision.didPlayerDie: Did that player die to the Pukka's attack?

process.wakeAndChoose: Wake the Pukka, let them choose a player, then put them back to sleep.
process.wakeAndExorcist: Wake the Pukka, show them who the Exorcist is, then put them back to sleep.
process.didChooseWhileSober: The player the Pukka chose is poisoned. Add the poisoned reminder token.
process.didChooseWhileDrunk: The player the Pukka chose is not poisoned. Do not move the Pukka's poisoned reminder token. If the Pukka was the first player to choose the Goon this night, mark the Pukka with the Goon's drunk reminder token.
process.attackWhileSober: The Pukka attacks the player previously marked with the Pukka's poisoned reminder token.
process.attackedStillPoisoned: That player's ability is still poisoned by the Pukka.
process.attackWhileDrunk: The Pukka does not attack the player marked with the Pukka's poisoned reminder token. They are still marked but are not affected by Pukka poison until the Pukka becomes sober and healthy.
process.removePoison: Remove the Pukka's poisoned reminder token on that player.
process.onDeathEffects: Any effect triggered at the moment of that player's death is still poisoned.
process.end: The Pukka's turn is over. If the Pukka becomes drunk or poisoned, any player marked with the Pukka's poisoned reminder token won't be affected by Pukka poison until the Pukka becomes sober and healthy. If the Pukka dies or changes player, remove all Pukka reminder tokens.

interactions.title: Character Interactions
interactions.source: Interaction data is sourced from LeCodex's {externalLink}Script Interactions tool{/externalLink}.
interactions.hasCountConflicts: {count} potential conflict between characters found. {link}View conflict{/link}.|{n} potential conflicts between characters found. {link}View conflicts{/link}.

errors.notFoundDescription: Check the URL, or go {link}back to home{/link}.
errors.genericErrorDescription: There must be a goblin in the code
errors.urlSizeQRDescription: The URL is too long to fit in a QR code.
errors.urlSizeScriptDescription: The URL contains more data than is reasonable for a script. If the script contains encoded character icons, then these should be uploaded to an external service.
errors.unknownCharacterDescription: The character "{id}" is not currently known by this website.
errors.unknownLocaleDescription: This website does not support the {locale} locale.
errors.decodingDescription: There was an error decoding the script from the URL.
errors.encodingDescription: There was an error encoding the script to put in the URL.
errors.invalidJsonDescription: The script was not valid JSON.
errors.invalidScriptDescription: The script has an issue preventing this website from working.
errors.requestFailedDescription: The request to {url} failed. If this keeps occurring, try downloading the script JSON yourself and uploading it.
